title: Wires
body:
### Wires


#### Commands

Luckperms permissions are also supported - ```wires.command_name```


```/staffchat [Message]``` - Sends a message to staffchat, where only those with perms can read. If no message is provided, the player will be moved into staffchat and all messages will be sent in there until toggled again

```/maintenance on || off``` - Toggles maintenance mode where only operators can join

```/mute 1h 2m 3s``` - Mutes a player for the time specified

```/servermute [duration]``` - Mutes all players for time specified

```/vanish [player]``` - Makes a player disappear from tab menu and makes them invisible. The command is a toggle


#### Discuss


For support, discussion and more join the discord at https://discord.gg/UxHnDWr
